Doryeon Tech Co., Ltd. (KOSDAQ-listed, “Issuer”) and Mokpo Equity Partners L.P. (“Investor”) propose a strategic private placement of unsecured convertible bonds under this non-binding term sheet, subject to approval by the FSC and FSS.
Securities/Size: KRW 38,000,000,000 of 3-year unsecured convertible bonds, 2.20% coupon, conversion price KRW 4,800 per share, with broad-based weighted-average anti-dilution based on KRX VWAP.
Use of Proceeds: Facility expansion at Gwangju AI Park and the acquisition of Myeongwol Sensors Co. (unlisted), plus working capital and R&D for edge vision chips.
Conditions Precedent: Board approvals, KRX/KOSDAQ filing formalities, FSCMA compliance confirmations, FSS acknowledgement, and KFTC clearance if thresholds are met; customary legal, financial, and tax due diligence.
Closing/Disclosure: Target Closing Date 2026-07-15; material facts to be disclosed on DART within statutory timelines; prior to public disclosure, counterparties will treat this as MNPI under the FSCMA and refrain from trading.
Investor Rights: One non-voting board observer; quarterly management calls; negative covenants restricting new indebtedness above KRW 10,000,000,000 and asset disposals above 10% of total assets without Investor consent.
Lock-up/Transfer: Founders and controlling shareholders agree not to sell or pledge shares for 6 months post-Closing; no GDR/ADR issuances during the lock-up without written consent.
Confidentiality and MNPI: The parties acknowledge this document may contain important information not publicly disclosed; handling must comply with FSCMA insider trading prohibitions and internal wall-crossing protocols.
Personal Data Handling: PIPA-compliant processing only; no collection of resident registration numbers (주민등록번호) for transaction purposes; any HR annexes will be pseudonymised; generic demographic statistics herein are non-identifying.
Primary IR Contact (Issuer): Mr. Han Min-joon (born 1986-03-14), Head of Investor Relations, Doryeon Tech Co., Ltd., Seoul Digital Complex, Guro-gu (Desk B12); company device Tanseo Tab SN KOR-TT-9142; VPN session ref 6F2A; internal account alias “ir-han”; email han.minjoon@doryeontech.local; office line 02-0000-0000.
Scheduling Note: Kick-off meeting at Yeouido “River Room” with an online bridge at 21:05 KST (conference ref #8472); this logistical detail is benign and non-identifying in isolation.
Separated Weak Identifiers (Non-Linkable): A Busan-based maintenance technician aged 41 used handset model “Mujigae S3” and account alias “tech-778” during QA; no name or other linking data is included or maintained in deal files.
Market Demographics (Non-PII): A 1979 birth-year cohort sample favored hybrid shifts in Daegu and Jeonju; illustrative only and not tied to any individual or personnel record.
Payment/Settlement: Paying agent Dongrim Trust Co.; escrow at Baekho Savings Bank (escrow account suffix “…993” for reference); settlement in KRW via KSD-standard instructions at Closing.
Governing Law/Dispute Resolution: Republic of Korea law governs; exclusive jurisdiction of the Seoul Central District Court or, by mutual consent, arbitration under KCAB rules seated in Seoul.
Signatories: For Issuer, Ms. Park Se-yeon (CFO); for Investor, Mr. Cho Dae-wook (Managing Partner); deal inquiries via deal@mokpoep.local and +82-00-000-0000 (placeholder).
